creator: sada@bsdclub.org
text:
Hello,

Got below messages on my 4.4-R.
Could you settle this ?

--
configure:4477: checking for main in -ltermcap
configure:4492: cc -o conftest -O -pipe  -Dfreebsd   conftest.c -ltermcap  -lm  1>&5
configure:4620: checking for PVM architecture
configure:4699: checking for main in -ldl
configure:4714: cc -o conftest -O -pipe  -Dfreebsd   conftest.c -ldl  -lm  1>&5
/usr/libexec/elf/ld: cannot find -ldl
configure: failed program was:
#line 4707 "configure"
#include "confdefs.h"

int main() {
main()
; return 0; }
(end of "config.log")
*** Error code 1

Stop in /home/sada/work/ports/scilab.
*** Error code 1

--
SADA Kenji <sada@bsdclub.org>
